specializations: TINOSORB® S (Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine) - photostable broad-spectrum
TINOSORB® M (Methylene Bis-Benzotriazolyl Tetramethylbutylphenol) - hybrid broad-spectrum
TINOSORB® A2B - next-generation full-spectrum balanced protection
Uvinul® T 150 (Ethylhexyl Triazone) - photostable UVB filter
product_highlights: TINOSORB® S - gold standard photostable broad-spectrum UVA+UVB filter
TINOSORB® M - unique hybrid organic/inorganic broad-spectrum filter
TINOSORB® A2B - next-generation balanced full-spectrum protection (newest)
Uvinul® A Plus - highly photostable UVA filter with excellent safety profile
Comprehensive photostability data and formulation support
notes: German chemical giant with the TINOSORB® UV filter brand — the gold standard for photostable broad-spectrum UV protection. TINOSORB® S and M are among the most widely used UV filters globally for premium sun care. TINOSORB® A2B represents the next generation of balanced full-spectrum protection. Uvinul® series provides additional UVA and UVB filter options. Strong sustainability commitment with Science Based Targets.
